// src/pages/DashboardPage.js import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import { getSessions } from "../utils/firebase"; import "./DashboardPage.css"; function DonutChart({ percent, color = "#7c6fcd" }) { const r = 44; const circ = 2 * Math.PI * r; const dash = (percent / 100) * circ; return ( ); } function MiniChart({ sessions, field, color, label }) { if (!sessions.length) return null; const vals = sessions.map((s) => s.metrics?.[field] ?? 0).reverse(); const max = Math.max(...vals, 1); return (
{label}
{vals.map((v, i) => (
))}
); } const DAYS = ["M", "T", "W", "T", "F", "S", "S"]; export default function DashboardPage({ navigate, user }) { const [sessions, setSessions] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { getSessions(20).then((data) => { setSessions(data); setLoading(false); }); }, []); const avg = (field) => { if (!sessions.length) return 0; return Math.round( sessions.reduce((acc, s) => acc + (s.metrics?.[field] ?? 0), 0) / sessions.length ); }; const overallProgress = avg("score") || 0; const streakDays = [true, true, true, true, true, true, false]; const streakCount = streakDays.filter(Boolean).length; const displayName = user?.displayName || user?.email?.split("@")[0] || "there"; const initials = displayName.slice(0, 2).toUpperCase(); return (
{initials}
{displayName} Student
{loading ? (

Loading your dashboard…

) : (

Hello, {displayName.split(" ")[0]}! 👋

Ready to speak with confidence today?

Start a Practice Session

Choose a scenario, record your speech, and get AI-powered feedback to improve.

{[...Array(9)].map((_, i) => (
))}
▶

Continue your practice

{sessions.length === 0 ? (
🎙️

No sessions yet — start your first one above!

) : (
{sessions.slice(0, 3).map((s, i) => { const pct = Math.min( 100, Math.round(s.metrics?.score ?? 0) ); return (
{s.scenario?.includes("Interview") ? "💼" : s.scenario?.includes("Thesis") ? "🎓" : s.scenario?.includes("Recitation") ? "📖" : "🎤"}

{s.scenario || "General Speaking"}

{s.date ? new Date(s.date).toLocaleDateString("en-PH", { month: "long", day: "numeric", }) : "—"}

{pct}% completed

🕐 {s.metrics?.duration ? `${Math.floor(s.metrics.duration / 60)} min` : "—"} Duration
〰️ {s.metrics?.wpm ?? "—"} WPM
💬 {s.metrics?.totalFillers ?? "—"} Fillers
⭐ {s.metrics?.score ?? "—"}/100 Score
); })}
)}
💡

Tip of the day

Pause for effect. Short pauses help your ideas land and keep your listeners engaged.

Overall Progress

{overallProgress >= 80 ? "Excellent work!" : overallProgress >= 60 ? "You're doing great!" : "Keep it up!"}

Keep practicing to reach your goal.

Weekly Streak

🔥

{streakCount} days

Great consistency!

{DAYS.map((d, i) => (
{streakDays[i] && ( )}
{d}
))}
{sessions.length > 0 && (

Your Averages

{sessions.length} Sessions
{avg("score")} Avg Score
{avg("wpm")} Avg WPM
{avg("totalFillers")} Avg Fillers
)}
)}
); }
